verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I wanna think of something that could lift my spirit high I think about the privilege of living in this hour God did work so wondrously in the days of history But I live in this age when He fully manifests in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is the Bride Age And I want the world to see The Pillar of Fire has come And it's setting God's children free This is the very hour that the prophets Of old have longed to see The age of the eagle, The time of the harvest The rapturing season is here, can't you see?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The wandering days are over Now that revelation came The seals have been broken And the Bible came alive to me Now I know my name's inscribed in the book of mystery And I live in this world As a witness that Jesus is alive in me
